data.title: Remove body grain; align card text (TalkCard muted, DocumentBadge focus ring); delete dead hero-text-shadow

data.body: Three small cleanups from the user's design.md review (decisions all finalized): (1) REMOVE the body noise/grain — delete the background-image feTurbulence data-URI from the body{} rule in src/index.css, and remove its 'Body noise/grain' description from DESIGN.md. It's effectively invisible (every page's opaque min-h-screen main background covers it) — user: 'get rid of grain for now'. (2) Delete dead .hero-text-shadow utility in index.css (0 uses). (3) Card text alignment: TalkCard (StoryPage) adopts muted secondary text — description -> text-body + text-foreground-muted, author -> text-foreground-muted — matching its sibling DocumentBadge; and DocumentBadge's faint focus ring (ring-house-publications-deep/40) -> ring-foreground for a11y. Has visual changes — preview before merge.

REVIEW: PASS (reviewed cold against plan task_01KV9DKGNE1TQVM7DY2H8NVDQP.md). All four changes correct and in scope. (1) Body grain removed: feTurbulence gone from src/index.css, body{} retains @apply font-sans antialiased bg-background text-foreground. (2) Dead .hero-text-shadow deleted; grep hero-text-shadow over src/ + DESIGN.md = 0. (3) StoryPage TalkCard author -> text-label text-foreground-muted, description -> text-body text-foreground-muted (no leading-relaxed added, per plan). (4) DocumentBadge focus ring -> ring-foreground; hover border on line 60 (hover:border-house-publications-deep/40) UNCHANGED. DESIGN.md: Overview noise clause dropped, Elevation 'Two touches' lead-in + both bullets removed, prose flows cleanly into 'The one true-depth surface...'. Scope guard honored: button.tsx NOT in diff (git diff --name-only excludes it); PAPER_GRAIN_BG still present (button.tsx:121,128). Gold band untouched. Gates: typecheck OK, build OK, conformance OK. Tests 151 passed / 7 failed = FRAC-199 baseline (buttons x2, footer x2, navigation x1, neighborhood x2) — no new failures, none in pages.test.tsx or touching the changed components. Visual PREVIEW gate still pending human sign-off before merge per plan.
